clipitem.name: FAMILY: never thought I'd get it
DIAGNOSIS: blood tests PSA oh my god
GRIT: can't do buttons still move on
GRIT: can't do buttons still move on
HOPE: brick walls as rest stops
HOPE: stay positive even in pain
HOPE: stay positive even in pain
CLOSE: live life never give up
